name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title loans and secured lines of credit using your vehicle title, plus unsecured personal loans. Memphis location at 3190 Summer Avenue serving since 2007.
description_long:
TitleMax is an emergency lending company operating a physical storefront at 3190 Summer Avenue in Memphis, TN, which has been serving the local community since February 2007. The store is located one mile west of Highland Street, across from Auto Zone, and maintains extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, Saturday hours 9am-4pm) to accommodate working customers seeking quick cash.

The company offers three primary financial products: Title Pledges (secured loans using vehicle title), Flex Lines of Credit (secured credit lines tied to vehicle value), and Unsecured Personal Lines of Credit (available in-store and online for eligible states). All products emphasize same-day approval and cash access. The title pledge and flex line of credit products allow customers to keep driving their vehicle while using the car title as collateral, and the company states it accepts "most credit types" with focus on vehicle value and repayment ability rather than credit scores alone.

The Memphis TN 9 location distinguishes itself through consistent high customer ratings (5.00/5 average across 481+ Google reviews) with specific praise for named staff members including Nicole, Joyce, and Jonathan. The store offers bilingual services and maintains separate customer portals for title loans versus personal loans. Requirements are straightforward: valid government ID, clear vehicle title, and vehicle inspection for title products; for unsecured lines, recent bank statements or proof of income plus valid SSN and email.

While the website emphasizes competitive rates, quick approval, and flexibility, important caveats exist: title loans are inherently high-cost debt products with repayment tied to vehicle collateral (risking car loss), the company performs credit checks despite "accepting most credit types," and rates/terms are not disclosed on the public website. Online personal loans are limited to 10 specific states. This is fundamentally emergency lending for consumers facing immediate cash needs but unable or unwilling to pursue traditional banking options.
address: 675 W Pioneer Pkwy Suite 112, Grand Prairie, TX 75051

company_info.headquarters: 675 W Pioneer Pkwy Suite 112, Grand Prairie, TX 75051

pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for title pledges and flex lines of credit
Keep driving your vehicle while using car title as collateral—no vehicle surrender required
Accepts most credit types and focuses on vehicle value rather than credit score alone
Bilingual staff available at this location
Extended weekday hours (9am-7pm Mon/Fri) and Saturday hours (9am-4pm) for working customers
Consistent 5.00/5 star rating across 481+ verified Google reviews with named staff praise
Multiple product options: title pledges, flex lines of credit, and unsecured personal loans
Clear, straightforward application requirements (valid ID, vehicle title, bank statement)
cons: Title loans are high-interest debt products secured by your vehicle—nonpayment risks car repossession and loss of transportation
No interest rates, APR, or fee information disclosed on website; pricing transparency not provided for cost comparison
Unsecured personal lines of credit limited to 10 states (excludes most of US); online-only availability restricted geographically
Credit checks performed despite marketing 'most credit types accepted'—approval not guaranteed and credit impact likely
Flex line of credit terms (drawdown mechanics, interest calculation, minimum payments) not explained on public website
best_for: Consumers with vehicle title equity facing immediate cash needs (auto repair, medical expense, utility bills) and no access to traditional credit
Gig workers and self-employed individuals in Memphis area without stable income documentation for bank loans
Customers in eligible states needing unsecured emergency credit without collateral or credit score requirements
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Memphis-area consumers facing genuine emergency cash needs ($100-$5K range) who own vehicles with clear titles and cannot qualify for traditional bank loans or credit cards. The critical caveat: title loans are secured debt that risks vehicle loss if you cannot repay—only viable if you can reliably service the loan and have backup transportation, and only after confirming actual interest rates/fees on the application (not disclosed publicly).
services: Title Pledges—loans using clear vehicle title as collateral with same-day funding
Flex Lines of Credit—secured revolving credit lines tied to vehicle value, drawable all at once or over time
Unsecured Personal Loans (In-Store)—flexible credit without collateral for eligible customers
Unsecured Personal Loans (Online)—remote application and approval in 10 eligible states
Same-Day Cash Approval—express funding process for title and flex credit products
Vehicle Title Inspection and Valuation—assessment to determine loan amount and credit limit
Credit Checks—underwriting process evaluating credit history alongside vehicle collateral
Customer Portal Management—separate online account access for title loans vs. personal loans
Competitive Rate Offerings—pricing structure based on vehicle value, loan amount, and repayment ability
